scenarios.name: Passkey registration endpoint in Express
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses generateRegistrationOptions/verifyRegistrationResponse from @simplewebauthn/server with excludeCredentials and challenge storage; baseline cobbles together raw WebAuthn API without library-specific patterns.

scenarios.name: Verifying passkey login with replay protection
scenarios.rationale: Treatment passes credential.publicKey and counter into verifyAuthenticationResponse and updates counter from authenticationInfo.newCounter as the SKILL.md prescribes; baseline mentions counter conceptually but lacks the simplewebauthn call shape.
